# UiPath.AmazonWorkSpaces.Activities

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

- [1.4.1](1.4.1.json)

- [1.3.0](1.3.0.json)

- [1.1.0](1.1.0.json)
